attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,
RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT,
ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE  AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(DEFAULT_LEVEL, 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
-999  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999) AS  RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE 

FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST ON ST.POS_TRANS_ID = SM_RST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
 AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP 
ON  TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'
			
 WHERE  ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'POS'

SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,    

CASE	
	WHEN NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO' THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
	WHEN NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'UO' THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  
	WHEN NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'CG' THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 
END AS RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,

RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,     
ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL, 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
-999  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999) AS  RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST 
        ON ST.LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
 AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  ST.LINE_ID
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP 
ON   TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'
			
 WHERE ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'ERP'

SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
CASE	
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO' THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'UO' THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'CG' THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID > 0 THEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,         

NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS  RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,

RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,  ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL , 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999)   AS RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE    

FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST 
		ON ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
		AND ST.LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
		AND SM_RST.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT = ST.RTE_HEADER_ID
	   AND SM_RST.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT = ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER 
	   AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    

/*  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE
code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */ 

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  ST.LINE_ID
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE   						

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON  ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
						AND NATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                      

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY   EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP  ON   TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)		

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID 

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT  ON  	ST.RTE_HEADER_ID = NRT.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT AND 
 							ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER = NRT.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT	
			
WHERE ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR' AND  ST.LINE_ID > 0 
/* code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */ 
AND SOL.BK_COMPANY_CODE NOT IN (SELECT COMPANY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_MIG  
WHERE  EL_MIG.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  )

UNION 


						 SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
CASE	
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO' THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'UO' THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'CG' THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID > 0 THEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,        

NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS  RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,

RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,  ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL , 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999)   AS RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE    

FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST 
		ON ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
		AND ST.LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
		AND SM_RST.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT = ST.RTE_HEADER_ID
	    AND SM_RST.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT = ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER 
		AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT


INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    

/*  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE
code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */ 

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  ST.LINE_ID
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE   						

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON  ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
						AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY   EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP ON   TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)		

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT  ON  	ST.RTE_HEADER_ID = NRT.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT AND 
 							ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER = NRT.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT	
			
WHERE ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR' AND ST.LINE_ID > 0 
/* code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */ 
AND SOL.BK_COMPANY_CODE IN (SELECT COMPANY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_MIG  
WHERE  EL_MIG.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  )


UNION


SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
CASE	
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO' THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'UO' THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID < 0 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  'CG' THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 
	WHEN ST.LINE_ID > 0 THEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,     

NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS  RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,

RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,  ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL , 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999)   AS RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE   


FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST 
		ON ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
		AND SM_RST.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT = ST.RTE_HEADER_ID
	   AND SM_RST.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT = ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER 
	   AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    

/*  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE
code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */ 

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  SOL ON  SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    =  ST.LINE_ID
						AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = SOL.SS_CODE   						

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON  ST.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
						AND NATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                      

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY   EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP  ON   TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)		

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID 

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT  ON  	ST.RTE_HEADER_ID = NRT.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT AND 
 							ST.RTE_LINE_NUMBER = NRT.SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT	
			
WHERE ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'AR' AND  ST.LINE_ID < 0 
/* code changed to take care of the AUS migrated data */

SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,
RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,  
ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL, 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
-999  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999) AS  RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE   

FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST ON ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = SM_RST.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
		AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP 
ON  TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM) 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'
			
WHERE  ST.BOOK_SOURCE IN ('SLS_ADJ', 'POS_ADJ')

SELECT 
SM_RST.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY , 
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  AS RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,

RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

CASE WHEN ST.POS_TRANS_ID IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  
ELSE ST.POS_TRANS_ID END  AS RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -9999 THEN  RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 
WHEN ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM = -999 THEN  RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 
ELSE ST.SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM END AS RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT     ,     
ST.BOOK_SOURCE AS BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ST.RESTATE_AM_ID  */ ERP.SALES_REP_NUM,
ST.SPLIT_PERC*100  AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
ST.BOOK_NET AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE AS RESTATEMENT_DT, 
COALESCE(ST.CREDIT_COUNTRY, 'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_CRDT_COUNTRY_NAME, 
ST.RULE_NAME AS RESTATEMENT_RULE_NAME, 
COALESCE(ST.DEFAULT_LEVEL, 'UNK')  AS DEFAULT_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_DESCR, 
'P' AS LATEST_RESTATED_FLG,
'P' AS LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
-999  AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NPT.PARTY_KEY, -999) AS  RESTATED_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY,
NXT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' AS DML_TYPE  
FROM $$STGDB.ST_RESTATE3_EDW_WRITEBACK ST

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT SM_RST 
        ON ST.LINE_ID = SM_RST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
		AND ST.EDW_NODE_ID=SM_RST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATE_AM_ID = SM_RST.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = SM_RST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ST.BOOK_SOURCE = SM_RST.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE
		AND ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID = SM_RST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
		AND ST.RESTATEMENT_DATE=SM_RST.RESTATEMENT_DT
		AND ST.TSL_TRX_ID=SM_RST.SK_TRX_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX  NXT ON  NXT.SK_TRX_ID_INT    =  ST.TSL_TRX_ID

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY EST ON EST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = ST.EDW_NODE_ID  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP ERP 
ON   TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ST.RESTATE_AM_ID)=TRIM(LEADING '0' FROM ERP.SALES_REP_NUM)

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=ST.ORIGINAL_SHARE_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPT ON NPT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.RESTATE_SAV_ID  AND 
			NPT.PARTY_TYPE='GROUP'  AND NPT.SS_CODE='SAV'
			
 WHERE ST.BOOK_SOURCE = 'XAAS'
